reviews.comment:
Para cargar nafta es muy lento siempre, no usan todas las líneas de carga y siempre hay cola de autos.  Por otro lado  la cafetería, ya cuando entras se siente el olor a sucio. No recomendado

(Translated by Google)
Getting gas is always very slow; they don't use all the lanes, and there's always a line of cars. Also, the cafeteria smells dirty as soon as you walk in. Not recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlX3RQNm93RRAB

reviews.comment:
